== Notes for [[Item:Q100739|Q100739]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gersonides '''Levi ben Gershon'''] (1288 – 20 April 1344), better known by his Graecized name as '''Gersonides''', or by his Latinized name Magister Leo Hebraeus, or in Hebrew by the abbreviation of first letters as '''RaLBaG''', was a medieval French Jewish philosopher, Talmudist, mathematician, physician and astronomer/astrologer. He was born at Bagnols in Languedoc, France. According to Abraham Zacuto and others, he was the son of Gerson ben Solomon Catalan.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8BBC501EFBBFA9822EF79916CA268
geni:6000000103266088016

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
